name: Kassi Cowhide Print Upholstered Accent Chair - Christopher Knight Home: Rubberwood Frame, Polyester Fabric
description:
Add a fun style to your home with the Christopher Knight Home Saloon Cowhide Print Dining Chair. Featuring gorgeous cowhide print and soft fabric with dark stained legs this chair is sure to delight. Place this chair at your dining table as a conversation piece or in your living room to provide extra seating. You will enjoy the comfort and look of this Christopher Knight Home Saloon Cowhide Print Dining Chair. A purchase you will cherish for years.

CONTEMPORARY: With clean lines and tapered legs, this accent chair features a prominent contemporary style. With a minimalistic and comfortable design, this chair will blend seamlessly with your decor while providing ample seating space in any room.

UPHOLSTERED: Our accent chair is generously upholstered, giving any room a refined appearance. This provides a smooth, immaculate texture for this piece as well as plush seating.

RUBBERWOOD: Our environmentally-friendly wood not only offers plenty of durability, but it also gives this piece a beautiful natural-grain look. Combined with a gorgeous finish, this wood will truly stand out in any room.

TAPERED LEGS: This chair showcases elegantly tapered legs for a chic look. With two straight front legs and two gently sloped back legs, this piece not only provides a stable structure but also a refined look to your home.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this chair. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
